assertionResults.fullName: PATCH /api/habit-entries/:id returns 200 when updating entry in active week
assertionResults.title: returns 200 when updating entry in active week

assertionResults.fullName: PATCH /api/habit-entries/:id returns 409 with WEEK_LOCKED when week is locked
assertionResults.title: returns 409 with WEEK_LOCKED when week is locked

assertionResults.fullName: POST /api/habits returns 201 with created habit on valid body
assertionResults.title: returns 201 with created habit on valid body

assertionResults.fullName: POST /api/habits returns 400 with VALIDATION_ERROR when name is missing
assertionResults.title: returns 400 with VALIDATION_ERROR when name is missing

assertionResults.fullName: DELETE /api/habits/:id returns 204 and excludes habit from GET /api/habits
assertionResults.title: returns 204 and excludes habit from GET /api/habits

assertionResults.fullName: DELETE /api/habits/:id returns 404 with HABIT_NOT_FOUND when habit does not exist
assertionResults.title: returns 404 with HABIT_NOT_FOUND when habit does not exist

assertionResults.fullName: GET /api/profile returns 200 with user profile when user exists
assertionResults.title: returns 200 with user profile when user exists

assertionResults.fullName: GET /api/profile returns 404 with USER_NOT_FOUND when no user exists
assertionResults.title: returns 404 with USER_NOT_FOUND when no user exists

assertionResults.fullName: POST /api/weeks/:weekId/redemptions returns 201 when user has enough points
assertionResults.title: returns 201 when user has enough points

assertionResults.fullName: POST /api/weeks/:weekId/redemptions returns 409 WEEK_REDEMPTION_LIMIT on second redemption in same week
assertionResults.title: returns 409 WEEK_REDEMPTION_LIMIT on second redemption in same week

assertionResults.fullName: POST /api/weeks/:weekId/redemptions returns 422 with INSUFFICIENT_POINTS when not enough points
assertionResults.title: returns 422 with INSUFFICIENT_POINTS when not enough points

assertionResults.fullName: GET /api/weeks/current — sincronización con hábitos activos incluye un hábito creado vía POST tras inicializar la semana vacía
assertionResults.title: incluye un hábito creado vía POST tras inicializar la semana vacía

assertionResults.fullName: GET /api/weeks/current — sincronización con hábitos activos excluye un hábito desactivado y revierte puntos/penalizaciones de la semana actual
assertionResults.title: excluye un hábito desactivado y revierte puntos/penalizaciones de la semana actual

assertionResults.fullName: GET /api/weeks/current — sincronización con hábitos activos conserva snapshots WeekHabit en semanas bloqueadas tras DELETE
assertionResults.title: conserva snapshots WeekHabit en semanas bloqueadas tras DELETE
